notes: Deterministic simulation using Mulberry32 PRNG. Reproduce any session with --seed <seed> --sessions 1 and sessionSeed = seed + sessId * 31337.

regression_tests.name: rebirth_loop_zero
regression_tests.description: No session should trigger rebirth loop exploit detection

regression_tests.name: machine_stacking_zero
regression_tests.description: No session should trigger machine stacking exploit detection

regression_tests.name: crop_arbitrage_zero
regression_tests.description: No session should trigger crop arbitrage exploit detection

regression_tests.name: random_event_exploit_zero
regression_tests.description: No session should trigger random event exploit detection

regression_tests.name: first_harvest_within_5min_p50
regression_tests.description: Active players must reach first harvest within 5 minutes at p50

regression_tests.name: first_harvest_within_3min_p90
regression_tests.description: Active players should still hit first harvest quickly at p90

regression_tests.name: automation_within_40min_p50
regression_tests.description: Active players must reach automation within 40 minutes at p50

regression_tests.name: automation_within_40min_p90
regression_tests.description: Active players must reach automation within 40 minutes at p90

regression_tests.name: inflation_index_lte20
regression_tests.description: Coin emission / coin sink ratio must stay <= 20 across the full simulation window

regression_tests.name: no_negative_cost_items
regression_tests.description: No machines, seeds, or upgrades should have zero or negative cost

regression_tests.name: no_infinite_loops
regression_tests.description: No player session should trigger an infinite stall loop

regression_tests.name: casual_prestige_rate_lte50pct
regression_tests.description: Casual players should prestige at most 50% of the time

regression_tests.name: active_prestige_rate_gte70pct
regression_tests.description: Active players should still experience prestige in long simulations

regression_tests.name: high_exploits_zero
regression_tests.description: No HIGH severity exploit should affect >5% of player sessions

regression_tests.name: cps_softcap_bypass_zero
regression_tests.description: No session should bypass CPS soft cap protections

regression_tests.name: prestige_abuse_zero
regression_tests.description: No session should trigger prestige abuse loop detection

regression_tests.name: processor_arbitrage_rate_lte2pct
regression_tests.description: Processor arbitrage signatures should stay under 2% of sessions

regression_tests.name: any_exploit_sessions_lte10pct
regression_tests.description: Sessions with any exploit signatures should stay under 10%
